---
id: capture-fixing
title: "Capture a rate fixing"
description: "Records a published fixing for a reference rate index (e.g., SOFR, CDOR) on a given date."

  path={"/api/v1/fixings"}

Records a published fixing for a reference rate index (e.g., SOFR, CDOR) on a given date.
